headline: Dow Jones Futures: Oil Prices Weigh On Stocks, But Oracle, Nvidia Lift These AI Names
summary: Stocks largely fell as crude oil prices jumped despite a record IEA reserves release amid the Iran war. Nvidia, Oracle news lifted AI stocks.

headline: Will Strong Demand Sustain Seagate's Margin Expansion Ahead?
summary: STX posts record exabyte shipments and margin expansion in fiscal Q2 2026 as demand for high-capacity drives and HAMR ramp boost profitability.
